title: Uluwatu Sunset & Temple
summary: Dramatic clifftop temples, surf breaks, and the best sunset views in southern Bali.
description: Sail toward Uluwatu's iconic sea temple, discover hidden surf spots, and end with a magical sunset viewing experience. This route combines cultural significance with natural beauty.
imageAlt: Yacht cruising past Uluwatu temple cliffs at golden hour
highlights: Discover hidden swimming coves along the cliffs
Sunset viewing with panoramic cliff panorama
Optional Kecak fire dance viewing at Uluwatu Temple
tips: Bring a light cover-up for temple visits
Camera essential for the dramatic scenery
seoTitle: Uluwatu Sunset Yacht Charter from Bali | Marelune Bali
seoDescription: Book a yacht to Uluwatu from Bali. Cruise past the famous sea temple, hidden beaches, and enjoy the best sunset views in southern Bali. From Rp14.500.000.
keywords: uluwatu yacht, bali sunset cruise, uluwatu temple boat, surf trip bali
